title: Parallel Demo
description: Demonstrates parallel bead execution with DAG a → {b, c}. Beads b and c run concurrently after a completes.

title: Setup
description: Initialize the project and install dependencies. No dependencies — runs first.

title: Frontend
description: Build the UI component. Depends on setup (a) completing first.

title: Backend
description: Build the API endpoint. Depends on setup (a) completing first.
